name: Sweet Onion Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a food processor, coarsely chop the onions and peppers. Process only two at a time to avoid turning them into paste.
2. Mix all the ingredients in a large, heavy stockpot and cook over medium heat together until the onions begin to become translucent, about 15 minutes.
3. Prepare 8 half-pint jars according to manufacturer's instructions. Spoon the relish into the jars, filling to 1/2 inch from the rim.
4. Clean the rims of the jars and seal them according to manufacturer's instructions.
5. Process sealed jars in boiling water for 10 minutes.
